title: How to build a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems with Gemini
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build continuous evaluation pipelines for multi-agent systems using Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, Cloud Run, and adaptive rubrics. The approach moves from subjective testing to data-driven assessment with automated regression testing, shadow deployments, and CI/CD integration for production AI agent workflows.
writeup: The video walks through building continuous evaluation pipelines for multi-agent systems using the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, Cloud Run, and adaptive rubrics. It matters because it replaces subjective, ad hoc agent testing with data-driven assessment suited to production workflows. Concrete takeaways include automated regression testing, shadow deployments, and CI/CD integration, along with metrics for tool use quality and continuous monitoring.
